=== info.txt

===================
===================
Bob Dylan
1992.04.10 
Launceston, Tasmania
Australia,Silver Dome

FLAC files  labelled "Les Kokay Australia 92-3"


CD1

1 All Along The Watchtower 2 Most Of The Time 3 Everything Is Broken 4 Just Like A Woman 5 Tangled Up In Blue 6 She Belongs To Me 7 Maggie's Farm 8 Love Minus Zero - No Limit (acoustic) 9 Little Moses (acoustic), 10 Golden Vanity (acoustic)

CD2

1 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic w band) 2 Cat's In The Well 3 I'll Remember You 4 Visions Of Johanna (acoustic w band) 5 Highway 61 Revisited 6 Absolutely Sweet Marie 7 Ballad Of A Thin Man 8 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 



8, 9, 18  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
4, 5, 7, 8, 11, 15, 16, 18  Bob Dylan harmonica.
10  acoustic with the band except drums.
11, 14  acoustic with the band.
5, 10, 11, 14  Bucky Baxter (mandolin).
15  Bucky Baxter (electric slide guitar).

BobTalk:

It's the comedy part of the show right here! ???? Anybody here ???? this guitar? (after interrupting Love Minus Zero).

This is off my new record. It's called Cat's In The Well.
